prompt: My NIP-05 verification isn't working. I set nip05 to 'Alice@MyDomain.com' in my profile. My nostr.json file at https://mydomain.com/.well-known/nostr.json contains: {"names":{"Alice":"npub1dp4rcz7ufm4rrequena8s8nh5aykdw9t7e2dj0gya9j9sskjhk0qdjd0lv"}}. When I curl the endpoint, I get a 301 redirect to https://www.mydomain.com/.well-known/nostr.json. What's wrong and how do I fix everything?
assertions: Output identifies that 'Alice' must be lowercase — only a-z0-9-_. are allowed
Output identifies that 'npub' format is wrong and must be converted to 64-character hex
Output identifies the 301 redirect as a problem — NIP-05 prohibits HTTP redirects
Output provides a corrected nostr.json with lowercase 'alice' and hex pubkey
Output fixes the nip05 profile field to 'alice@mydomain.com' (all lowercase)
Output provides guidance on fixing the redirect in the server configuration
Output contains 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' or 'CORS' as a required header
Output does NOT just say 'convert npub to hex' — it explains hex means 64 lowercase characters
